title: Dikiy vostok
overview: The Solar Children, a group of dwarves who left the circus, are trying to start a settlement in the Kyrgyzstan wilderness just after the breakup of the Soviet Union, but are harassed by a gang of bikers. With their meager savings, they hire a ragtag group of heroes to drive off the bikers.

trailers.title: Дикий Восток  — Эпизод с Е. Фёдоровым (1993)
